case_title: CHASE BANK, USA, N.A., A CORPORATION VS. ELENA CASTELLANOS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL CONTRACT AND WAIVER OF EXCESS INTEREST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK, USA, N.A., A CORPORATION
